.gitignore.general_idea: Removed the gitignore entry for the frontend public resources directory as part of moving away from a monorepo structure.
Added gitignore entries for Firebase deployment artifacts and logs.
Added standard Maven build output and wrapper ignore patterns.
Added ignore patterns for Spring Tool Suite IDE artifacts.
Added ignore patterns for IntelliJ IDEA project files.
Added ignore patterns for NetBeans project files and build directories.
Added ignore patterns for VS Code configuration and workspace files.
Added ignore patterns for local configuration files while preserving examples and READMEs.
Added ignore pattern for JetBrains Fleet IDE artifacts.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the README to reflect the separation of the monorepo into a dedicated backend repository.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title from 'UTS DPM V2' to 'UTS DPM' and added link to frontend repo.

README.md.general_idea: Removed Angular CLI specific development instructions as the frontend code is no longer in this repository.
README.md.human_impl: Deleted sections for 'Development server', 'Code scaffolding', 'Build', 'Running unit tests', etc.

README.md.general_idea: Added documentation for running the Spring Boot backend using Maven and configuring database secrets.
README.md.human_impl: Added text describing Maven wrapper usage, db_scripts location, and application.properties configuration.

README.md.general_idea: Documented the hosting platform and local development tools available for the backend.
README.md.human_impl: Added note about Heroku hosting and Swagger UI local access URL.
